baseNeed.description: The deep human driver selected from the baseNeeds dataset.

rootNode.description: The emotional engine or core truth selected from rootNodes.

psychologicalCluster.description: The emotional universe the root node belongs to.

surfaceOverlay.description: The domain translator applied to the emotional truth.

wrapper.description: The narrative frame used to deliver the insight.

format.description: The structural shape of the content (listicle, X→Y, 3-step, etc).

distributionPhysics.description: Platform-level mechanics that influence pacing and structure.

narrativeSequence.description: The 5-part narrative arc generated from the psychological layers.

psychologicalBreakdown.description: The deeper psychological interpretation of the content.

rendererMapping.description: The format-specific output instructions for each renderer.
